title: pabstiella dryadum
intro: Pabstiella dryadum, also known as the Dryad's Cap, is a species of epipactis orchid that is native to Europe. The plant contains glycosides, flavonoids, and other compounds that give it medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pabstiella dryadum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues.
